+ "ASSISTIVE_ACCESS_CALL_CARRIER"

+ "DURATION LABEL: Label too wide, hiding immediately"
+ "DURATION LABEL: Shrinking duration font, duration=%f"
+ "DURATION LABEL: animateTransition to hidden=%{bool}d"
+ "PHONE ICON: animateTransition raise phone icon to top"
+ "PHONE ICON: positionForLandscape — centering phone icon (currentLabelState .hidden)"
+ "didUpdateParticipantAVMode - call is screening, no join notice"
+ "invalidate link %@"
+ "localParticipantCornerSize: %s for corner=%s since isActiveWithVideo=%{bool}d, isShowingControls=%{bool}d, isPreviewingLocalReaction=%{bool}d"

- "Calistoga"
- "CallControlsMenuViewController: About to call shouldDodge from shouldDodgeBottom..."
- "CallControlsMenuViewController: About to call shouldDodge from shouldDodgeTop..."
- "CallControlsMenuViewController: shouldDodge - DODGE %{bool}d"
- "CallControlsMenuViewController: shouldDodge - DODGE because controls visible and views horizontally overlap, even if views are vertically far apart (vertical gap: %f)"
- "CallControlsMenuViewController: shouldDodge - DODGE because views are overlapping"
- "CallControlsMenuViewController: shouldDodge - NO DODGE because controls hidden and views are far apart enough (vertical gap: %f) where we shouldn't have to worry about overlap issues"
- "CallControlsMenuViewController: shouldDodge - Views are close (vertical gap: %f), checking horizontal alignment, DODGE %{bool}d"
- "CallControlsMenuViewController: shouldDodge BOTTOM %{bool}d"
- "CallControlsMenuViewController: shouldDodge TOP %{bool}d"
- "localParticipantCornerSize: localParticipant is not active with video, using .regular(corner: %s"
- "localParticipantCornerSize: using .info(corner: %s) since isShowingControls=%{bool}d and isPreviewingLocalReaction=%{bool}d"
- "localParticipantCornerSize: using .regular(corner: %s) since isShowingControls=false and isPreviewingLocalReaction=false"
